item.title: CVE-2025-64512 - CVE-2025-64512 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
Bedside.htb_solved: Writeup educativo de la máquina Bedside (Medium) de Hack The Box. Cubre: reconocimiento, explotación de deserialización insegura en pdfminer.six (CVE-2025-64512), path traversal en Vite dev server, y escalada de privilegios mediante abuso de torch.load()/pickle. Fines educativos únicamente.

item.title: CVE-2026-55993 - CVE-2026-55993 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-55993: PoC reproducer for CVE-2026-55993 (Apache Camel camel-atmosphere-websocket): the WebSocket consumer copies connection query parameters onto the Exchange unfiltered, so an injected CamelHttpUri drives a server-side request (SSRF) and leaks resolved property placeholders. Fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0.
